recommendations.title: Mr. Brooks
recommendations.overview: A psychological thriller about a man who is sometimes controlled by his murder-and-mayhem-loving alter ego.

recommendations.title: Dog Pound
recommendations.overview: Three juvenile delinquents arrive at a correctional center and are put under the care of an experienced guard.

recommendations.title: Mulholland Falls
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Los Angeles, a special crime squad of the LAPD investigates the murder of a young woman.

recommendations.title: 10 Rillington Place
recommendations.overview: The story of British serial killer John Christie, who committed most or all of his crimes in the titular terraced house, and the miscarriage of justice involving Timothy Evans.

recommendations.title: The Kingdom
recommendations.overview: A team of U.S. government agents is sent to investigate the bombing of an American facility in the Middle East.

recommendations.title: The Cabin in the Woods
recommendations.overview: Five friends set out for a weekend at a remote cabin in the woods, expecting nothing more than fun and relaxation. As night falls, they discover that something far more unsettling is at work and that nothing about their getaway is what it seems.

recommendations.title: I Am All Girls
recommendations.overview: A special crimes investigator forms an unlikely bond with a serial killer to bring down a global child sex trafficking syndicate.

recommendations.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows
recommendations.overview: There is a new criminal mastermind at large (Professor Moriarty) and not only is he Holmes’ intellectual equal, but his capacity for evil and lack of conscience may give him an advantage over the detective.

recommendations.title: Cocoon
recommendations.overview: When a group of trespassing seniors swim in a pool containing alien cocoons, they find themselves energized with youthful vigor.

recommendations.title: LaRoy, Texas
recommendations.overview: Broke and depressed, Ray  is mistaken for a dangerous hitman and given an envelope of cash. Along with his P.I. friend Skip, he must escape the actual hitman to make it out of LaRoy alive.
